title: O123456789
description: A mod that changes the item count numbers to those from Create mod
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/df7ba84d5a50faa9cff393059576ac220cf6965f.png)
# Yep, that's the entire purpose of this mod! This mod changes the item count numbers to those from Create mod.I just thought it would've been cool to make, and so I did. The numbers have been taken from Create mod's stock GUI ## Compatible with you favorite mods! ![compat showcase](https://i.imgur.com/tW19EkD.png) ![showcase](https://i.imgur.com/ADTL8hw.png)
